changes.reason: Batch G only. VALID_1DTE_ONLY is a real edge at 20 trades and $1315.3, but it is lower efficiency than the core VALID_0DTE sleeves and carries -386.75 worst MAE. Current threshold is 0.05; stepping to the grid value 0.08 tests whether stronger 1DTE forward DEX confirmation improves 1DTE heat and PnL/hour without disabling the fallback.

The 1DTE sleeve has median ES-VWAP slope 0.0551 in the deepest 1DTE MAE fingerprint while current profile slope minimum is only 0.01. Raising to 0.04 keeps it below the bad-row median and below the main no-0DTE breakout threshold, but removes weak/flat continuation attempts when 0DTE evidence is unavailable.

Current 1DTE profile has a 3-point median TP and positive expectancy, but 1DTE trades are not the convex call-wall edge. A 6-point max-distance is the middle Batch G grid value, allowing moderate continuation while preventing wide stale-style targets from stretching exposure.

expected_effect: Should improve VALID_1DTE_ONLY risk-adjusted contribution by requiring cleaner forward DEX and ES continuation, with flat or better 1DTE average/worst MAE and PnL per exposure hour. Main tradeoff is possible loss of some profitable 1DTE fallback trades; reject if combined 1DTE PnL drops below 98% of the current $1315.3 without a material MAE or exposure-efficiency gain, or if total trades fall more than 10%.
label: 1dte-forward-dex-continuation-box
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted. The leader is plateaued at $7532.8 and 103 trades, while broad veto and upstream changes have either repeated or harmed the objective. The underexplored, legal next move is to refine the 1DTE fallback sleeve without touching VALID_0DTE option-confirmed profiles. breakout_long_1dte is profitable and should not be disabled, but it has 20 trades, $170/hour, average MAE -124.6, and worst MAE -386.75, so a modest continuation-quality box is a cleaner experiment than another call-wall or squeeze duplicate.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes 20 trades and $1315.3 with no slow trades, but lower PnL/hour than pullback_long and a -386.75 worst MAE. Prior notes argue against deleting or broadly tightening the edge; this tests a profile-local confirmation box instead.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Forward DEX Continuation Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The 1DTE sample may be too small, and stronger forward DEX plus VWAP slope can cannibalize profitable fallback insurance without materially reducing the kept worst MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, breakout_long_1dte selected, and the trade depends on 1DTE forward DEX plus ES continuation rather than valid 0DTE confirmation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: VALID_1DTE_ONLY PnL remains >=98% of $1315.3 unless worst/average MAE improves materially; 1DTE PnL/hour improves above $170/hour; total net profit remains >=98% of leader; completed trades drop <=10%; slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The leader family is a short-sample, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper over about 12.3 calendar days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so risk...
